name: Spicy Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
This is my top favorite banana cake recipe baked in a tube pan. I have made it for over fifteen years and its never once failed me. Its so easy, yet makes alot!
1. Cream together sugar, butter or margarine, and oil until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and cloves.
4. Combine mashed bananas and milk; add to creamed mixture alternately with the flour mixture, beating smooth after each addition.
5. Stir in nuts (if desired) and raisins.
6. Turn batter into a greased and floured ten-inch tube pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for one hour.
8. Cool on a wire rack for ten minutes before inverting to cool completely.
